scripts.build:all: yarn workspaces foreach -Apt --exclude keon-wifi-sdk-monorepo run build
scripts.lint: yarn workspaces foreach -Ap --exclude keon-wifi-sdk-monorepo run lint
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspaces foreach -Ap --exclude keon-wifi-sdk-monorepo run typecheck
scripts.test: yarn workspaces foreach -Ap --exclude keon-wifi-sdk-monorepo run test
scripts.dev:fug:react: yarn build && yarn workspace keon-fug-react dev
scripts.dev:fug:vue: yarn build && yarn workspace keon-fug-vue dev
scripts.dev:fug:svelte: yarn build && yarn workspace keon-fug-svelte dev
scripts.dev:fug:vanilla: yarn build && yarn workspace keon-fug-vanilla dev
scripts.dev:fug:node: yarn build && yarn workspace keon-fug-node start
scripts.dev:classic:react: yarn build && yarn workspace keon-classic-react dev
scripts.dev:classic:vue: yarn build && yarn workspace keon-classic-vue dev
scripts.dev:classic:svelte: yarn build && yarn workspace keon-classic-svelte dev
scripts.dev:classic:vanilla: yarn build && yarn workspace keon-classic-vanilla dev
